calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Re: Charitable Beneficiaries Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom:
Ernest Der, Esq. for Debra Dolch, Petitioner and Successor Trustee;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

The Court stated that it had reviewed the probate examiner's notes, that this case has a lengthy history, that the petitioner was appointed May 2015 as the trustee, that the petitioner is bringing the request under Prob. Codes 17200(b)(6) and 17206, and that San Francisco is the proper venue since the matter in Napa County was dismissed. Mr. Der confirmed for the Court that San Francisco is the proper venue. Mr. Der stated that the petitioner is holding $1,900,000.00 in funds from the eminent domain lawsuit, that the excess in funds being held could be used for the Jean Schroeder Education Trust's (JSET's) purpose, and that there are no clear instructions. Mr. Der also stated that the tax exemption was revoked some time ago, that the litigation is still going on in Contra Costa County with Mr. Scherner, that they will hold back $400,000.00 in funds for attorney's fees, and that they want to release the excess funds to those that they can help or benefit.

At the conclusion of Mr. Der's comments, the Court granted the Petition for Instructions Re: Charitable Beneficiaries of Trust stating that the petition is sufficient on its face. The Court addressed one procedural issue stating that the petition requested language that instructed the petitioner to terminate the trust upon final distribution and that the proposed order submitted to the Court did not include that language. Mr. Der stated that a revised proposed order was emailed to Ms. Kim, the probate examiner, yesterday. The petition is granted subject to receipt of Mr. Der's revised proposed.

The Court ordered distributions made as follows:
1. 1/3 to Napa Valley College Foundation for scholarships for needy students to attend Napa Valley College, in memory of Jean Schroeder;
2. 1/3 to Augustana University of Sioux Falls, SD for needy students to attend Augustana University at Sioux Falls, SD, in memory of Jean Schroeder;
3. 1/3 to The Regents of the University of California, for the benefit of UC Davis, for scholarships for needy students to attend UC Davis, in memory of Jean Schroeder.

Judge: Ronld E. Quidachay. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Jaime. Matter not reported.

Petition For Instructions Re: Charitable Beneficiaries Of Trust
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Continued To Oct-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
